results.term: Yeah, I'm not big on the medication.  I've talked ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yeah, I'm not big on the medication.  I've talked to several moms that went on it and years later had to stay on it because the withdrawals were so terrible.  I'd like to be able to process through it(7)

results.term: Well, some of them LOL!  Others just scare me to p...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, some of them LOL!  Others just scare me to pieces so it really depends on who it is!  My husband does not understand at all but he's trying (8)

results.term: I don't think a lot of people talk about it.  You ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I don't think a lot of people talk about it.  You have this new healthy child, you should be excited, and yet there is extreme sadness and no idea why so you stay quiet about it (9)
